summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries shipped to Colombia normally need dangerous-goods transport classification and test evidence aligned with UN Manual of Tests and Criteria section 38.3, then applied through the relevant air, sea, road, carrier, port, customs, and importer documentation route. UN 38.3 is transport evidence; it is not a Colombian RETIE approval, fire approval, or grid-connection approval.
summary.zh: 运往哥伦比亚的锂电芯和电池通常需要按照《联合国试验和标准手册》第38.3节准备危险货物运输分类及测试证据，并通过相应航空、海运、公路、承运人、港口、海关和进口商文件路径实施。UN 38.3是运输证据，不是哥伦比亚RETIE批准、消防批准或并网批准。
summary.zht: 運往哥倫比亞的鋰電芯和電池通常需要按照《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第38.3節準備危險貨物運輸分類及測試證據，並通過相應航空、海運、公路、承運人、港口、海關和進口商文件路徑實施。UN 38.3是運輸證據，不是哥倫比亞RETIE批准、消防批准或併網批准。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, section 38.3
Applicable modal dangerous-goods rules for shipment to Colombia
Carrier and importer dangerous-goods documentation requirements

summary.en: China export files often include UN 38.3 test reports, MSDS or SDS, battery test summaries, packaging evidence, and dangerous-goods declarations. These remain necessary for transport, but they do not replace Colombian electrical, fire, or grid project approvals.
summary.zh: 中国出口资料通常包括UN 38.3测试报告、MSDS或SDS、电池测试摘要、包装证据和危险货物申报。这些文件对运输仍然必要，但不能替代哥伦比亚电气、消防或电网项目批准。
summary.zht: 中國出口資料通常包括UN 38.3測試報告、MSDS或SDS、電池測試摘要、包裝證據和危險貨物申報。這些文件對運輸仍然必要，但不能替代哥倫比亞電氣、消防或電網項目批准。

gap.en: Keep transport evidence tied to the exact cell, module, pack, and container configuration being shipped. Recheck whether changed cell suppliers, pack layouts, SOC limits, packaging, or containerized integration require updated test summaries or carrier acceptance.
gap.zh: 运输证据应对应实际发运的电芯、模组、电池包和集装箱配置。更换电芯供应商、电池包布局、SOC限制、包装或集成式集装箱配置时，应重新核查是否需要更新测试摘要或承运人接受文件。
gap.zht: 運輸證據應對應實際發運的電芯、模組、電池包和集裝箱配置。更換電芯供應商、電池包佈局、SOC限制、包裝或集成式集裝箱配置時，應重新核查是否需要更新測試摘要或承運人接受文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated lithium-battery dangerous-goods transport where applicable; not a substitute for Colombia market, electrical, fire, or grid approvals
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport where lithium battery dangerous-goods rules apply

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a transport gate, not a Colombia BESS market-access approval. Treat it as shipment evidence and keep separate RETIE, fire, and grid approval files.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输门槛，不是哥伦比亚BESS市场准入批准。应将其作为运输证据，并另行维护RETIE、消防和并网批准文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸門檻，不是哥倫比亞BESS市場准入批准。應將其作為運輸證據，並另行維護RETIE、消防和併網批准文件。
